variants.title: HiFi Filter OA 1126 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO55850
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OA 1126 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO55850. Easy to install and replace, the OA 1126 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
